businessInfo.tagline: Premium websites and CRM systems for ambitious businesses.

heroSection.title: Scale Your eBay Business with Expert Marketplace Support
heroSection.description: YOFLIX helps businesses create, manage, and grow eBay accounts through professional account management, virtual assistant support, and marketplace operations.

aboutSection.title: We create websites for real businesses.
aboutSection.description: Yoflix helps businesses build stronger online presence through clean design, modern delivery, and conversion-focused systems.

cards.title: Professional Design
cards.body: Minimal, premium, and credible layouts designed around trust.

cards.title: Mobile Ready
cards.body: Every project is built mobile-first for modern users and real buying behavior.

cards.title: Business Focused
cards.body: Design decisions are shaped by commercial clarity, not decorative noise.

seoSettings.metaTitle: Yoflix | Premium Business Websites and CRM Systems
seoSettings.metaDescription: Yoflix creates premium websites, pricing funnels, and CRM-backed admin systems for serious business growth.

services.title: Brand and product positioning
services.description: We turn broad offers into clear, premium narratives that buyers can understand in one pass.

services.title: Website and funnel experience
services.description: We design business websites that feel product-grade, not brochure-grade, across every breakpoint.

services.title: Full-stack implementation
services.description: We ship performant frontends, dependable APIs, and admin tooling that your team can actually use.

services.title: CRM and lead operations
services.description: We connect marketing and sales handoff with structure, visibility, and cleaner follow-through.
